raw:
{
  "judge_id": "responsibility-bearing judge",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.3", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.2": 5,
    "R1.3": 5,
    "R1.6": 5,
    "RX.1": 4,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 4
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The agent output walks the chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, and proposes minimal repairs.",
    "R1.3": "The agent audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure, providing concrete specifics to support claims.",
    "R1.6": "The revised draft reads as a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register, no lost meaning, and improved clarity.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for some clearly out-of-reach claims (e.g., kernel choice), but not all recommendations are marked with confidence and missing evidence.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original draft (e.g., vagueness, lack of specificity).",
    "RX.5": "Major rewrites are traced, but minor edits are not annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "R1.3": 0.95,
    "R1.6": 0.95,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.99,
    "RX.4": 0.95,
    "RX.5": 0.85
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: The agent output walks the chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, and proposes minimal repairs.
rationale.R1.3: The agent audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure, providing concrete specifics to support claims.
rationale.R1.6: The revised draft reads as a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register, no lost meaning, and improved clarity.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for some clearly out-of-reach claims (e.g., kernel choice), but not all recommendations are marked with confidence and missing evidence.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original draft (e.g., vagueness, lack of specificity).
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced, but minor edits are not annotated with source and reason.
